examples: Study on treatment for knee osteoarthritis joint with antipyretic detoxicate compound recipe;
Aspergillas Niger is one of the microbes to detoxicate rapeseed meal. It can decrease the contents of phytin acid and glucosinolate in rapeseed meal effectively.
The study adopted different methods to detoxicate Castor Bean Meal. The best method would be selected. After that, growing pigs were fed with detoxicated and toxic Castor Bean Meal.
